mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_spam_report ( user_id, message_id, report_reason, report_status, external_transaction_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{messageId}, #{reportReason}, #{reportStatus}, #{externalTransactionId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO kisa_skt_message ( list_seq, spam_type, src_num, cust_num, cb_num, rcv_time, msg, spam_probability, number_of_sc, status, save_dt, email_flag ) VALUES ( #{listSeq}, #{spamType}, #{srcNum}, #{custNum}, #{cbNum}, #{rcvTime}, #{msg}, #{spamProbability}, #{numberOfSc}, #{status}, NOW(), #{emailFlag} )
INSERT INTO tworld_configurations_history ( job_dt, usr_id, cust_num, job_kind, rst, job_msg ) VALUES ( DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), 'PASS', #{custNum}, '30', #{rst}, #{jobMsg} )
